prose:
Computed property: condensed Fukui function indices (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰, dual descriptor) for every atom in ferrocene; headline value reported here is the largest electrophilic Fukui index f⁺ = 0.22885456 on the iron centre.

Method provenance
• Property: atom‐condensed Fukui reactivity indices (f⁺ for nucleophilic attack, f⁻ for electrophilic attack, f⁰, and dual descriptor) in the gas phase.
• Level of theory: GFN2-xTB semi-empirical tight-binding (no Gaussian basis; no DFT functional). Density-fitting is inherent to the method.
• Geometry provenance: Fixed experimental geometry supplied as `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/ferrocene/ferrocene.xyz`; no re-optimization – single-point neutral (N), cationic (N–1, charge +1, multiplicity 2) and anionic (N+1, charge –1, multiplicity 2) calculations performed on this same geometry (GFN2-xTB//experimental-XYZ).
• Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation model).
• Charge / multiplicity: neutral singlet for the parent (charge 0, multiplicity 1); spin-doublet for the cation and anion states used in the finite-difference scheme.
• Software: `xtb` (GFN2-xTB implementation) via chemkit `fukui-reactivity` skill.
• Convergence & caveats: SCF cycles for all three charge states converged (engine reported integrity status "ok" and trustworthy true). The automatic charge-conservation checks report sums of f⁺ and f⁻ as exactly 1.0000, flagged only as informational warnings (see below). No other warnings were issued.

Most reactive sites
• Most electrophilic (largest f⁻): Fe atom (index 11) with f⁻ = 0.25938191.
• Most nucleophilic (largest f⁺): Fe atom (index 11) with f⁺ = 0.22885456.

Representative files & reproducibility
• JSON result (all indices, charges, integrity data): `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpavgxg8oe/live.json`
• Plot of f± colour-mapped on geometry: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/ferrocene/argo_o3/20260703-193509_ferrocene_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`
• Live engine log was streamed during execution to a `.out` file in the caller’s working directory (path was printed when the run started; you can review or `tail -f` it for full SCF details).

Warnings from the engine (verbatim)
• sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
• sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
• common header present
